description_long: This house features a modern, angular design with a mix of flat and gable roofs, surrounded by a landscaped yard with several mature trees and a small pool. The exterior is primarily white with some sections in light brown, and large windows are distributed asymmetrically across the facade. The property includes a spacious driveway leading to a garage, and a green lawn area is visible on one side. The backyard is partially enclosed with fencing and features a pool and patio area, providing outdoor living space. The main entryway is set back from the driveway, marked by a small porch and a prominent front door. The overall layout suggests a contemporary suburban home with two stories and a focus on open, airy spaces.
description: A modern two-story house with white and light brown exterior, large asymmetrical windows, a driveway, garage, landscaped yard, and a backyard pool.
description_view_0: Front and side view showing the main entry, large windows, driveway, and landscaped yard with trees.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard, pool, patio area, and additional green space.
description_view_2: Direct front view with clear visibility of the driveway, garage, main entry, and front lawn.
description_view_3: Opposite rear view showing the back of the house, pool, and more trees along the property edge.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with a small porch, single front door, and minimal overhang, flanked by landscaping.
